content.text:
The zoomed view clearly shows atom **N:7** and its covalent bonds. Let me confirm the connections by examining the image:

From the zoomed-in view, atom **N:7** (Nitrogen) is covalently bonded to two atoms:

1. **C:1** (Carbon, index 1) — bonded to the left/upper-left
2. **C:6** (Carbon, index 6) — bonded to the right/upper-right

These are the two bonds emanating from N:7, forming part of a five-membered ring.

---

### Summary

| Neighbour Atom Index | Element |
|---|---|
| 1 | C |
| 6 | C |

question: Please find the neighbour atoms of the atom with atomic index 7, whose element should be N. Here, neighbour atoms are defined as atoms that are covalently connected to this atom. Report all neighbour atoms by listing their atomic index (as shown in the image) and their element. Also return the geomconf_index for this molecule.
